plot outline: Marcus and Mike have to confront new issues (career changes and midlife crises), as they join the newly created elite team AMMO of the Miami police department to take down the ruthless Armando Armas, the vicious leader of a Miami drug cartel.
title: Bad Boys for Life
akas: 绝地战警：疾速追击 (China, Mandarin title)

distributors.name: Walt Disney Studios Sony Pictures Releasing (WDSSPR)

special effects companies.name: Institute for Creative Technologies at the University of Southern California
